title: boryangraecum ochraceum
intro: Boryangraecum ochraceum, also known as Korean yellow orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. The plant has been traditionally used in Korean medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Boryangraecum ochraceum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Boryangraecum ochraceum can be prepared as a herbal tea or extract, and is often used in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
